diagrams.title: TLS Handshake Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Complete visualization of TLS 1.2 full handshake messages between client and server
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the sequential exchange of messages and state transitions during TLS handshake

diagrams.title: TLS Record Protocol Structure
diagrams.description: Layered view showing data transformation from application data to TLS record
elements: TLS Record Header (Content Type, Version, Length)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how data is encapsulated, authenticated, and encrypted in TLS Record Protocol

diagrams.title: Certificate Chain Verification
diagrams.description: Hierarchy showing certificate trust chain from leaf certificate to root CA
diagrams.purpose: Understanding PKI trust model and how browsers verify server certificates through the chain
